## Entities.Molds.ICavities type

Represents the cavities in a mold

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ICavities = {
    readonly kind: 'grid';
    readonly columns: number;
    readonly rows: number;
    readonly info?: ICavityInfo;
} | {
    readonly kind: 'count';
    readonly count: number;
    readonly info?: ICavityInfo;
};
```
